property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card counts as up to two copies of itself for your card effects.) Focused physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful, you may reveal any number of cards from your hand and place them on the bottom of your life deck then draw the same number of cards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: During your opponent's Power Up Step, you may gain X power stages. Whenever an opponent's card effect would allow them to gain power stages, you may gain X power stages, where X= your MP's PUR.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Empower 2. Attach this card to your World Games Saga Blue Style Mastery. While attached, whenever a Blue style card effect raises your anger, you may gain 4 power stages instead, and the first attack you perform each combat gains "If this attack is styled, this card stays on the table to be used an additional time this combat." You may only have 1 Blue Saiyaman Beam attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Energy attack. Empower 2. Attach this card to your opponent's Main Personality. While attached, your opponent may only place 1 non-combat card in play per turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If you declared a tokui-waza, you may use this card to stop an energy attack. If used to stop an energy attack that had less base damage than this card, discard the top 4 cards of your opponent's life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. You may raise your anger 1 level. You may return X opponent's Non-Combat cards in play to their owner's hand, where X= your current personality level. At the beginning of the discard step this turn, your opponent reveals their hand and you choose a card, your opponent discards all other cards from their hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you draw or reveal this card with the effect of your Mastery card, you may remove this card from the game and give up winning by MPPV to advance a personality level.) Saiyan Heritage Only. Stops a physical or energy attack. The next Saiyan style attack you play this combat is shuffled into your life deck after use. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Torbie is your MP, this card is also considered styled matching your tokui-waza and gains Transform.) Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, or used by Torbie, raise your anger 2 levels, and for the remainder of combat, all life cards of damage from your attacks are removed from the game instead of discarded.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Tapkar only. When entering combat as the Attacker, you may remove the top 4 cards of your life deck from the game to draw 2 cards. This drill is not discarded when you advance or lose a personality level. You may only have 1 Tapkar's Acceleration Drill in play at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin Vegeta only. You may not win by MPPV. Advance to your highest personality level. For the remainder of the game, your opponent is considered to be a rogue. Place the top 5 cards of your deck under your warrior sword. When entering combat, choose the top card under your warrior sword and add it to your hand. When you draw the last card, remove the top 10 cards from your opponent's life deck from the game, then you lose the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Videl only. Raise Videl to her highest power stage. Attach to your MP. While attached, your "Heroes only" cards are also considered Videl named cards and to have "Heroic" in the title. When entering combat, search your life deck for a card with "Heroic" in the title and add it to your hand. You may only have 1 copy of this card attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Discard up to 1 ally in play. Search your life deck for a card with "first attack" or "first card" in the power box and add it to your hand. For the remainder of combat, all attacks/cards you perform/play with that title are considered the first attack/card you performed/played this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Pikkon only. Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. Attach to your MP. While attached, if your MP is Pikkon, once per combat you may use the personality power on one of your other levels instead of the one on your current level. You may only have 1 copy of this card attached at a time.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Dodoria only. Search your life deck or discard pile for a level 1 Zarbon and Frieza ally and place them into play at 3 power stages above 0. For the remainder of combat, your personality powers on Dodoria, Zarbon, and Frieza are unstoppable, and your Zarbon and Frieza allies do not need to be in control of combat to use their powers and constant combat powers.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card counts as two Allies and Personalities with "Android" in the title for your card effects.) Android 13 only. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. You may give up winning by MPPV to attach this card to your MP. While attached, when you play a card with "Android" in the title, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Players must attack or pass during their attacker attacks phase each combat. Players cannot end combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Physical attack doing 4 life cards of damage. Your other physical attacks that do not do power stages of damage do an additional +2 life cards of damage for the remainder of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your anger cannot be lowered. Attacks you perform with "Sword" in the title do +2 power stages of damage. Minotia does not need to be in control of combat to use this power. If Tapion is your MP, this card gains Resist.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (If Chi-Chi is your main personality your allies can use this Constant Combat Power.) Constant Combat Power: If one or more of your allies with Saiyan Heritage would leave play from an opponent's card effect, set them aside and put them into play at the beginning of your next turn at 3 power stages above 0. If you have 8 or more allies in play at the beginning of your turn, you may advance Chi-Chi a personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, whenever you calculate damage using the PAT, determine Nappa's bracket as though he were using the Saiyan Saga PAT.) Power: Stops a physical attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: After every attack you perform in your Attacker Attacks phase, you may draw a card and then discard a card. Power: Energy attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: After each of your Attacker Attacks phases, if you did not pass, you may draw a card then discard a card. Power: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage, or 7 life cards if Jeice is in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: After each action you perform during combat, if you did not pass, you may draw a card, then discard a card. Power: Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. You may use this power 3 times per combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, your styled cards with printed endurance have their endurance increased by 1.) Power: Remove a card in your discard pile with printed endurance from the game to raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your attacks with printed endurance are Focused. Your cards with printed endurance that do not raise your anger gain "you may raise your anger 1 level."

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your styled cards without endurance gain Endurance 1. As long as you have 10 or more cards in your removed from the game pile with printed endurance, your attacks deal +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes and Devilman only. Focused energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If successful, you may have this attack do X less life cards of damaged to lower your opponent's MP X personality levels. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 4 life cards of damage. Empower 2. If successful, or performed by a personality with "Android" in the title, attach this card to your MP. While attached, your opponent's card effects cannot stop you from gaining power stages, and you may remove this card from the game to stop an energy attack. You may only have one copy of this card attached at a time.
